content:
# Lorenz Coefficient

**Summary**: A coefficient used to describe the distribution of permeability.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021]] calculated Lorenz coefficients to assess the distribution of flow capacity.

## Scientific Context

- [[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021]] Indicates how much of the flow is concentrated in a few channels.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021]] calculated from permeability data.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Lorenz coefficients ranged between 0.292 and 0.628. ([[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021, p. 13]])

## Contrasting Values and Interpretations

- [[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021]] 0.292–0.628
